summary: Frontend-only verification completed for Royal Spark shop grid/image-fit update on public preview URL. Requested flows passed.
action_items: No blocking fixes required for requested frontend scope.
Keep validating breakpoint behavior if grid classes are changed again.
critical_code_review_comments: ShopPage grid uses md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-4, which correctly limits 4-column layout to desktop-xl while preserving smaller breakpoints.
ProductCard image uses object-contain with padding, reducing aggressive crop and showing full product area more cleanly.
Catalog/product data is MOCKED via local seeded data; Shopify readiness endpoint is informational only (MOCKED integration context).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated via browser automation on public URL. Desktop /shop renders 4 cards in first row; tablet shows 2 per row; mobile shows 1 per row. Product image computed style confirms object-fit: contain. Product detail click from shop card successfully navigates to /shop/:slug with no runtime error banner detected.
rca of the issue: No defect reproduced in requested scope. Layout and image-fit behavior match implementation and runtime observations across desktop/tablet/mobile.
